_comment: STAGING-ONLY, explicit, human-verified Neon->Cortex tenant map for the Phase 2C.19 dry-run. NOT production. Contains NO secrets. Resolution is an EXACT integer org_id lookup only — no fuzzy matching. Any Neon organization_id not listed (or inactive) is REJECTED (fail-closed). cortex_user_id values are deterministic STAGING fixture owners (OWNER_A/OWNER_B). A real staging load must re-verify the cortex_user_id exists in staging Cortex `users` and that the org truly belongs to that owner.

entries.notes: STAGING DRY-RUN ONLY: single Neon production org (id=1) bound to OWNER_A staging fixture user. No-load. Before any real staging load this binding MUST be re-verified: confirm OWNER_A (or the correct owner) exists in staging Cortex `users`, and that Neon org 1 genuinely belongs to that owner (Neon org email/gst are NULL, so this is an operator decision, not an automatic match).
